name: html-voice
description: Generate voice narration and audio files for each slide in Reveal.js HTML presentations, embedding notes and audio paths.
intent_triggers: 為 HTML 簡報生成語音介紹
把 Reveal.js 簡報加上語音
預覽第幾頁的語音文字
幫簡報加上自動播放語音
generate voice narration for my slides
add audio to a Reveal.js presentation
create voiceovers for each HTML slide
preview the voice text for slide 3
幫我產生 report.html 每一頁的語音和備註

html_file.description: Path to the HTML report or presentation

output_dir.description: Output directory for generated audio and notes

embed.description: Embed notes into the HTML output

voice.description: TTS backend: auto, edge, or gtts

examples.intent: 為 HTML 報告生成所有頁面的語音
